layout.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 for containers, tight gap-4 for data grids
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Pattern. Dense, data-heavy, full width utilization.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-slate-200), no shadow. On hover: subtle shadow-sm.
surfaces.header: Solid background (bg-white) with a hard 1px bottom border.
surfaces.inputs: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm), sharp 1px border. Focus state must have 2px ring of accent color.

components.buttons: Flat, no shadow, rounded-sm, font-medium, tracking-wide.
components.tables: Dense, tabular nums, sticky header, hover states on rows. Text aligned left, numbers aligned right.
components.inputs: Textarea for multiple IDs, drag-and-drop zone for CSV/Excel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA 4.5:1. Primary button text must be white against #0A2540.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='verify-stones-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a modern B2B dashboard for Gem/Stone Certificate Verification.
Implement a clean, high-contrast, 'Swiss' design aesthetic. Avoid soft, muddy gradients or heavy shadows.
Main interface should feature a split view or bento grid: Input area (Textarea for manual entry + File upload dropzone) and Results Table.
The data table must handle multiple rows clearly, displaying inventory_id, carat_wt, color, clarity, shape, and a generated certificate URL.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Integrate a sleek 'Export to PDF/Excel' action area.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
